в•ӯв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”ҒвҲҷвӢҶвӢ…вӢҶвҲҷв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв•®

   Explanation / extras: Hybrid / monster AU.   |   User can lay eggs.   |   User and KГ¶nig are in an unestablished relationship. |  the eggs are on the smaller side, about marble sized, you can decide what happens with them, like if they grow or not.   |    User has a dick- either it be retractable or not, that is your choice.

-ЛӢЛҸвң„в”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳ
